text.title: Google Ads Campaign Setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Google Ads Campaign Setup. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Campaign created ENABLED via API; conversion tracking not yet wired; smart bidding optimizes on zero conversions; budget burns in hours.
antipattern.fix: Default API call to status=PAUSED; flip to ENABLED only after checklist pass.

antipattern.symptom: API created Search campaign; Display + Partners active by default; CTR drops 50% due to display impressions; CPA inflated.
RSA with 5 headlines launched; Ad Strength: Poor; impression share 30% below target.
antipattern.fix: Require 15 headlines + 4 descriptions before save; reject ads under threshold.
